subcodes.first_line: Verily, the layers of light descending from heaven encompass thy resplendent resting-place and thy sacred and pure tomb, O thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان طبقات النور النازله من السماء تحف مرقدک الباهر و جدثک الطیب الطاهر یا من
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @eulogies; reminiscences, @visitation Tablets
